Name: Perceptual Crossing Experiment - Beta-Band EEG Coherence
Description: Magnitude-squared coherence (MSC) in the standard beta band (13-30 Hz) computed for two fixed 4-second epochs that bracket the PAS crossover confidence interval: PRE [17-21 s] (sampling phase) and POST [34-38 s] (selection phase). The PAS 4/3 crossover occurs at 27.73 s (95% CI: 21.49-33.39 s); the click-time peak is ~24.4 s. The entire CI window is excluded from both epochs.

DyadID.Description: Numeric identifier for the experimental dyad. Parsed from the .mat filename (e.g., pce01_P1_Trial01.mat -> Dyad 1).

ParticipantID.Description: Participant number within the dyad (1 or 2). Parsed from the .mat filename.

PairIdx.Description: Index into the 351 unique channel pairs (nchoosek(27,2)). ChA and ChB identify the two electrodes.

Coh_PRE.Description: Mean magnitude-squared coherence in the beta band (13-30 Hz) during the PRE epoch [17-21 s].

Coh_POST.Description: Mean magnitude-squared coherence in the beta band (13-30 Hz) during the POST epoch [34-38 s].

PRE.Label: Sampling phase
PRE.Rationale: 4 s immediately before CI lower bound (21.49 s)

POST.Label: Selection phase
POST.Rationale: 4 s immediately after CI upper bound (33.39 s)

ROIs.Frontal: Fp1, Fp2, F7, F3, Fz, F4, F8, FC5, FC1, FC2, FC6
ROIs.Parietal: CP5, CP1, CP2, CP6, P7, P3, Pz, P4, P8, O1, O2
ROIs.Left: Fp1, F7, F3, FC5, FC1, T7, C3, CP5, CP1, P7, P3, O1
ROIs.Right: Fp2, F8, F4, FC6, FC2, T8, C4, CP6, CP2, P8, P4, O2
ROIs.FrontoParietal: Cross-region: one Frontal + one Parietal electrode

SourceData.Description: Preprocessed EEG .mat files from MNE-Python pipeline. Data from pair 31 are not included in the repository due to incomplete recording caused by a system error.
SourceData.Preprocessing: 0.1 Hz high-pass, 60 Hz low-pass (zero-phase FIR), spherical spline interpolation of bad channels, ICA artifact removal (30 components, EOG detection via Fp1/Fp2).

GeneratedBy.Name: preprocessEEG.m
GeneratedBy.Description: MATLAB preprocessing script for PCE beta-band EEG coherence.
